plugins.name: twitter-tools
plugins.description: Fetch normalized X/Twitter content, download referenced media, and monitor configured X/Twitter users for downstream agent workflows.

plugins.name: obsidian-tools
plugins.description: Route external content and save normalized content into Obsidian vaults for downstream knowledge workflows.

plugins.name: kol-tools
plugins.description: Build and query private KOL digital-twin archives from fetched social content.

plugins.name: notification-tools
plugins.description: Queue, route, and dispatch local agent notifications to Feishu.
